---
title: "Session 08 teaching notes: Python 5"
session_id: session-08
event_id: null
---

## Session 8 — Sequences and conditionals

TOOD: include visualization of IBAN

p.91: nr 3: hausaufgabe
p.97 nr 2 hausaufgabe

tuples: kurz (zB. pandas: df.shape, ...)

p.105: 3 hausaufgabe
-> nr 4: explain in-class (importance of code in/outside of if)
p. 106/107: homework (tutorium)


Use the exercises to move from sequences to conditional logic, while keeping the stated homework decisions.

## Exercises

| Page(s) | Exercise          | Summary                                                                                                                   | Files                                                                                                              | In-class / take-home |
| ------: | ----------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | -------------------- |
|   91–92 | Strings and IBAN  | Perform string inspection and manipulation and calculate an IBAN validation number from user input.                       | `String1.py`<br>`String2.py`<br>`String3.py`<br>`IBAN.py`                                                          |                      |
|      97 | List operations   | Create, inspect, extend, reorder, and modify lists and calculate values derived from their elements.                      | `Listexercise1.py`<br>`Listexercise2.py`                                                                           |                      |
| 105–107 | Conditional logic | Implement odd/even checks, discounts, rating-based interest, a dice game, temperature conversion, grades, and income tax. | `OddEven.py`<br>`Discount.py`<br>`AnnuityLoan2.py`<br>`Dicegame1.py`<br>`Temperature.py`<br>`Grade.py`<br>`Tax.py` |                      |

## Pages 91–92 — Strings and IBAN

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class exercise]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-exercise} [`../materials/session_08/String1.py`](../materials/session_08/String1.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-exercise}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_08/String1.py >}}
```

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class exercise]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-exercise} [`../materials/session_08/String2.py`](../materials/session_08/String2.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-exercise}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_08/String2.py >}}
```

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class exercise]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-exercise} [`../materials/session_08/String3.py`](../materials/session_08/String3.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-exercise}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_08/String3.py >}}
```

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class exercise]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-exercise} [`../materials/session_08/IBAN.py`](../materials/session_08/IBAN.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-exercise}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_08/IBAN.py >}}
```

- Assign exercise 3 on Page 91 as homework.

::: {.callout-note title="TODO"}
Include a visualization of the IBAN procedure.
:::

## Page 97 — List operations

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class exercise]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-exercise} [`../materials/session_08/Listexercise1.py`](../materials/session_08/Listexercise1.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-exercise}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_08/Listexercise1.py >}}
```

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class exercise]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-exercise} [`../materials/session_08/Listexercise2.py`](../materials/session_08/Listexercise2.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-exercise}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_08/Listexercise2.py >}}
```

- Assign exercise 2 as homework.
- Cover tuples briefly; use `df.shape` as an example.

::: {.teaching-break}
☕ Break — 10 minutes
:::

## Pages 105–107 — Conditional logic

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class exercise]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-exercise} [`../materials/session_08/OddEven.py`](../materials/session_08/OddEven.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-exercise}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_08/OddEven.py >}}
```

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class exercise]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-exercise} [`../materials/session_08/Discount.py`](../materials/session_08/Discount.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-exercise}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_08/Discount.py >}}
```

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class exercise]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-exercise} [`../materials/session_08/AnnuityLoan2.py`](../materials/session_08/AnnuityLoan2.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-exercise}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_08/AnnuityLoan2.py >}}
```

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class exercise]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-exercise} [`../materials/session_08/dicegame1.py`](../materials/session_08/dicegame1.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-exercise}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_08/dicegame1.py >}}
```

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class exercise]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-exercise} [`../materials/session_08/Temperature.py`](../materials/session_08/Temperature.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-exercise}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_08/Temperature.py >}}
```

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class exercise]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-exercise} [`../materials/session_08/Grade.py`](../materials/session_08/Grade.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-exercise}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_08/Grade.py >}}
```

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class exercise]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-exercise} [`../materials/session_08/Tax.py`](../materials/session_08/Tax.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-exercise}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_08/Tax.py >}}
```

- Assign exercise 3 on Page 105 as homework.
- Explain exercise 4 in class, emphasizing the importance of whether code is inside or outside an `if` block.
- Assign Pages 106–107 as homework for the tutorial.

## Summary and announcements

- TODO

::: {.callout-tip title="Notes for improvement"}
Take notes on improvements and common questions during the session and add them to `feedback.qmd` afterwards.
:::
